Calculation.Text: "Enter a descriptive name for the Link"

StyledText.Data: Name your IO with an understandable name. It makes it easier when you connect your Page item to the IO when authoring.

Calculation.Text: "Paste text variable string that you will use in the title"
"Enter a name for your text variable"
"Enter a name for your text variable"

StyledText.Data: Set a default text when empty

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ( TF TV Link Default text::PrimaryKey )

StyledText.Data: Set a default text when empty

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( TF TV Link Default text::PrimaryKey )

StyledText.Data: Create text variables that makes it easier to display text that is stored in this IO anywhere in the Title. Please check if the ioContext property in the { ioContext:auto} is correct. ioContext:auto - Funkis Player will display member input in scoll lackages and group input in slide packages. ioContext:member: Text variable will display IO input from the current member only. ioContext:group: Text variable will display IO input that belongs to the group. ioContext:session: Text variable will display IO input that belongs to the session.

Internal The link will be used to navigate to other items in the same Title. Any Package, Chapter, Page or Page item can be a target. External An external link is an URL outside the current title. It can be any URL. An external link can be localised and point to differnet URL:s for each language. File The link is used to download a file that is incuded in the title. The target file should be uploaded in the container of the link.
<<Media LK 2::Container original filename>> Width <<Media LK 2::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media LK 2::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media LK 2::Container file size readable>>

Calculation.Text: Case ( Media LI 1::Container file extension = "svg" ; "data:image/xml+svg," & TextDecode ( Media LI 1::Media container ; "utf-8" ) ; "")

StyledText.Data: <<Media LK 1::Container original filename>> Width <<Media LK 1::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media LK 1::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media LK 1::Container file size readable>>
Describes what kind of FAT item the internal link is pointing to.
The current item for internal items.

LayoutObject.name: WV

Calculation.Text: FAT Link::Link type ≠ "Internal" Or FAT Link::Internal item type ≠ "Package"
FAT Link::Link type ≠ "Internal" Or FAT Link::Internal item type ≠ "Chapter"
FAT Link::Link type ≠ "Internal" Or FAT Link::Internal item type ≠ "Page"
FAT Link::Link type ≠ "Internal" Or FAT Link::Internal item type ≠ "Page item"
FAT Link::Link type = "File" Or FAT Title::Title Backend = "LMS"
Not SubtitleMedia ( Media LK 1::Container file extension )

StyledText.Data: Current window The link will be opened in the same window as the current package. Default for internal links. New window / New tab The link will be opened in a new window or tab. Modal The link will be open in a modal window, floating on top of current window.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty("title_id"; FAT Link::Title id) & SetProperty("link_type"; FAT Link::Link type) & SetProperty("item_id"; FAT Link::Internal Item id) & SetProperty("item_type"; FAT Link::Internal item type) & SetProperty("link_url"; FAT Link::Link ModifierValue)
FAT Link::Link type = "File" Or FAT Title::Title Backend = "Funkis Cloud"

StyledText.Data: Show <<Number of instances>> items using this link
Enter an external URL. An external URL can also be a text variable, based on user input.

Calculation.Text: "Enter a default text when text variable is not set."
IsEmpty ( TF TV Link Default text::PrimaryKey )

SetProperty ( "referer_id" ; FAT Link::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Link::Title id ) & SetProperty ( "variable_string" ; FAT Link::Link variable reference ) & SetProperty ( "referer_type" ; "link" )
Not SubtitleMedia ( Media LK 2::Container file extension )
